headline: Teardown in progress (epic #80). #51 DONE + pushed green on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (2 commits): legacy docs SPA stripped (src/app/pages/** + app entry + prerender + 6 docs-shell components, −15k LOC), HdsSystemDocLayout relocated to layouts/, vercel.json repointed to build Storybook, page-scanning guardrails unwired + registry pruned (56→49 gates), a hidden audit-tokens ENOENT + broken `pnpm build` CI step fixed, manifest regenerated. Library build (build:lib), Storybook build, vitest (1078), smoke:consumer, and CI-critical manifest/registry gates all green. Resolves #56. Earlier this run: 5 issues closed (#83/#59/#54/#62/#48); Chromatic publishing + lilac-bonds + MetadataList divided + Satoshi-only all live at 0.11.0.
next: Remaining teardown cluster: #49 (delete portfolio assets/apps outright — note portfolio PAGES already removed with #51), #50 (archive+strip local-AI bridge/bot tooling; archive/local-ai preserved), #53 (consolidate ~27 md docs → ~5). Attended — lead reviews before merge.
